questions.text: Who holds the record for most men's Grand Slam singles tennis titles?

responses.text:
Roger Federer holds the record for the most men's Grand Slam singles tennis titles with 20.

(*Note: This answer is accurate as of August 2022, but titles can change as more tournaments are played.)
